https_redirects.finding: CRITICAL: http://surecash.com.au/ returns 200 OK instead of redirecting to HTTPS. HTTP loads the site directly without redirect. This creates a split between HTTP and HTTPS versions, potential duplicate content, and means non-HTTPS traffic is served insecurely.

hsts.note: HSTS is set but HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect is not enforced at the server level — a conflict

wordpress_security.xmlrpc: Returns 405 with x-robots-tag: noindex — restricted but accessible
wordpress_security.wp_login: Accessible at /wp-login.php (200) — no IP restriction observed
wordpress_security.wp_json_users_detail: REST API /wp/v2/users returns usernames: keiran_kirannyyy, colourfaster_pietzzz, frogs-n-dogs — user enumeration risk

sitemap.finding: Sitemap index references HTTP URLs (http://surecash.com.au/post-sitemap.xml etc.) instead of HTTPS. Child sitemaps use HTTPS correctly. The HTTP references in the index may confuse search engine crawlers.
sitemap.finding_categories_tags: Blog category and tag pages (e.g. /category/payday-loans/, /tag/cash-loans/) are indexable and included in the XML sitemap but have no unique content. These are thin taxonomy pages that dilute crawl budget and create duplicate signals.

indexable_admin_pages.finding: CRITICAL: Four internal/admin pages are indexable with no robots meta noindex tag and no sitemap exclusion.

pages.title: leads - Sydney Fast Cash Loans | Sure Cash Finance
pages.issue: Internal leads page — should be noindexed

pages.title: Citations | Sydney Fast Cash Loans | Sure Cash Finance
pages.issue: Internal citations tracking page — should be noindexed

pages.title: Brand Page | Sydney Fast Cash Loans | Sure Cash Finance
pages.issue: Internal brand/agency page — should be noindexed

pages.title: LM Buy | Sydney Fast Cash Loans | Sure Cash Finance
pages.issue: Internal buy page — should be noindexed

canonical.homepage_canonical: https://surecash.com.au (missing trailing slash — inconsistent with sitemap URLs which use https://surecash.com.au/)
canonical.product_pages: Correct self-referencing canonicals on all tested product pages
canonical.location_pages: Correct self-referencing canonicals on location pages

page_speed.page_speed_api: Quota exceeded — PSI data not available for this session
page_speed.finding: HTML payload is 345KB — high for a text-based financial site. 120KB inline styles and 66KB inline JS are baked into the page. WP Rocket is active (lazy load, defer, minify). TTFB at 0.93s is acceptable but not excellent for a financial site where users expect immediate response.

mobile.finding: user-scalable=0 prevents pinch-to-zoom on mobile devices. This is an accessibility violation (WCAG 1.4.4) and a Google mobile usability signal. Should be removed.

location_pages.finding: No LocalBusiness schema on any location page tested (Gosford, Wollongong, Tweed Heads, Sydney). For a business with physical branches, LocalBusiness schema with address, phone, and opening hours is expected.

internal_linking.finding: Weak internal linking between product pages and location pages. The payday-loans page links only to nav items, not to location-specific pages. Location pages do not link to loan product pages. This limits PageRank flow between the site's two main content pillars.

orphan_pages.check: lm-buy, citations, brand-page, leads — present in sitemap but appear to be internal admin tools

issues_priority.issue: HTTP does not redirect to HTTPS
4 admin/internal pages indexable (leads, citations, brand-page, lm-buy)
issues_priority.fix: Add <meta name='robots' content='noindex, nofollow'> to all 4 pages, or add to robots.txt Disallow

issues_priority.issue: WordPress user enumeration via REST API
issues_priority.fix: Disable /wp-json/wp/v2/users endpoint or restrict to authenticated users

issues_priority.issue: Sitemap index uses HTTP URLs in <loc> tags
issues_priority.fix: Update WordPress Site URL to HTTPS in Settings — this will fix Yoast sitemap output

issues_priority.issue: Blog category and tag pages indexed with no unique content
issues_priority.fix: Add noindex to all category and tag archive pages via Yoast SEO settings

issues_priority.issue: LocalBusiness/FinancialService schema missing on all pages
issues_priority.fix: Add Organization/FinancialService schema to homepage; add LocalBusiness schema to branch location pages (Gosford, Wollongong, Tweed Heads, Sydney)

issues_priority.issue: Homepage canonical URL missing trailing slash
issues_priority.fix: Set canonical to https://surecash.com.au/ (with trailing slash) to match sitemap

issues_priority.issue: user-scalable=0 on viewport meta blocks pinch zoom
issues_priority.fix: Remove maximum-scale=1 and user-scalable=0 from viewport meta tag
Implement CSP header via LiteSpeed/server config

issues_priority.issue: WP Rocket delays some JS — verify Core Web Vitals via CrUX data in GSC
issues_priority.fix: Monitor CWV in GSC Page Experience report
